data.name: Screening Procedures
data.label: Screening
data.description: Initial evaluations to determine participant eligibility.

data.name: Study Intervention Administration
data.label: Drug Administration
data.description: Oral administration of ALXN1840 with water.

data.name: Copper Balance Measurement
data.label: Cu Balance
data.description: Calculated difference between copper intake (food and drink) and output (feces and urine).

data.name: Molybdenum Balance Measurement
data.label: Mo Balance
data.description: Calculated difference between molybdenum intake (food, drink, and ALXN1840) and output (feces and urine).

data.name: Food and Fluid Sample Collection
data.label: Dietary Sample Collection
data.description: Collection of meal and fluid batches for copper and molybdenum concentration analysis.

data.name: 24-hour Urine Sample Collection
data.label: 24h Urine Collection
data.description: Collection of 24-hour urine samples for copper and molybdenum content measurement.

data.name: Fecal Sample Collection
data.label: Stool Sample Collection
data.description: Individual collection of fecal samples for copper and molybdenum content measurement.

data.name: Physical Examination

code.decode: Office or other outpatient visit for the evaluation and management of a new patient, which requires a medically appropriate history and/or examination and low medical decision making. When using time for code selection, 30-44 minutes of total time is spent on the date of the encounter.

data.label: Physical Exam
data.description: Assessment of cardiovascular, respiratory, gastrointestinal, and neurological systems.

data.name: Vital Signs Measurement

code.decode: Office or other outpatient visit for the evaluation and management of an established patient, that may not require the presence of a physician or other qualified health care professional. Usually, the presenting problem(s) are minimal.

data.label: Vital Signs
data.description: Assessment of body temperature, heart rate, respiratory rate, and systolic/diastolic blood pressure.

data.name: 12-lead Electrocardiogram

code.decode: Electrocardiogram, routine ECG with at least 12 leads; with interpretation and report

data.label: 12-lead ECG
data.description: Collection of triplicate 12-lead electrocardiograms.

data.name: Blood Sampling (Venipuncture)

code.decode: Collection of venous blood by venipuncture

data.label: Blood Draw
data.description: Collection of venous blood samples for pharmacokinetic (PK) and pharmacodynamic (PD) analyses, and other laboratory tests.

data.name: Serum Chemistry Assessment
data.label: Serum Chemistry
data.description: Laboratory analysis of serum chemistry parameters.

data.name: Hematology Assessment

code.decode: Complete (CBC) and automated differential WBC count

data.label: Hematology
data.description: Laboratory analysis of hematology parameters, including complete blood count.

data.name: Coagulation Assessment
data.label: Coagulation
data.description: Laboratory analysis of coagulation parameters.

data.name: Urinalysis

code.decode: Urinalysis, by dipstick or tablet reagent for bilirubin, glucose, hemoglobin, ketones, leukocytes, nitrite, pH, protein, urobilinogen, specific gravity; non-automated, without microscopy

data.label: Urinalysis
data.description: Laboratory analysis of urine.

data.name: Urine Pregnancy Test

code.decode: Urine pregnancy test, visual color comparison methods

data.label: Urine hCG Test
data.description: Detection of human chorionic gonadotropin (hCG) in urine.

data.name: Serum Pregnancy Test
data.label: Serum hCG Test
data.description: Detection of human chorionic gonadotropin (hCG) in serum.

data.name: Adverse Event Monitoring
data.label: AE Monitoring
data.description: Collection and follow-up of adverse event information.

data.name: Serious Adverse Event Monitoring
data.label: SAE Monitoring
data.description: Collection and follow-up of serious adverse event information.

data.name: Informed Consent Process
data.label: Informed Consent
data.description: Discussion and documentation of participant informed consent.

data.name: Admission to Clinical Research Unit
data.label: CRU Admission
data.description: Participant admission to the clinical research unit for inpatient periods.

data.name: Discharge from Clinical Research Unit
data.label: CRU Discharge
data.description: Participant discharge from the clinical research unit after completion of inpatient procedures.

data.name: Outpatient Visit

code.decode: Office or other outpatient visit for the evaluation and management of an established patient, which requires a medically appropriate history and/or examination and low medical decision making. When using time for code selection, 20-29 minutes of total time is spent on the date of the encounter.

data.label: Outpatient Visit
data.description: Scheduled or unscheduled participant visit to the clinic.

data.name: Contraception Discussion and Documentation
data.label: Contraception Counseling
data.description: Discussion and documentation of contraception methods.

data.name: Follicle-stimulating Hormone (FSH) Test
data.label: FSH Test
data.description: Blood test for follicle-stimulating hormone, for post-menopausal females.

data.name: Alcohol Test
data.label: Alcohol Screen
data.description: Screening for alcohol use.

data.name: Urine Drug Screen

code.decode: Drug test(s), presumptive, any number of drug classes; any specimen, qualitative, including instrument assisted analysis and interpretation of result(s)

data.label: Drug Screen (Urine)
data.description: Screening for illicit drug use via urine sample.

data.name: HIV Screen

code.decode: Antibody; HIV-1 and HIV-2, single assay

data.label: HIV Test
data.description: Screening for Human Immunodeficiency Virus.

data.name: Hepatitis B Screen

code.decode: Antibody; hepatitis B core antibody, total

data.label: Hep B Test
data.description: Screening for Hepatitis B virus.

data.name: Hepatitis C Screen
data.label: Hep C Test
data.description: Screening for Hepatitis C virus.

data.name: Medical History Collection
data.label: Medical History
data.description: Collection of participant's medical history.

data.name: Demographics Collection
data.label: Demographics
data.description: Collection of participant demographic information (age, sex, race, ethnicity).

data.name: Wilson Disease History Collection
data.label: WD History
data.description: Collection of specific history related to Wilson disease diagnosis and progression.

data.name: Prior Wilson Disease Treatment History Collection
data.label: Prior WD Tx History
data.description: Collection of information on previous treatments for Wilson disease.

data.name: Height Measurement
data.label: Height
data.description: Measurement of participant's height.

data.name: Weight Measurement
data.label: Weight
data.description: Measurement of participant's weight.

data.name: Body Mass Index (BMI) Calculation
data.label: BMI Calculation
data.description: Calculation of Body Mass Index from height and weight.

data.name: Discontinuation of Chelation Therapy
data.label: Stop Chelation
data.description: Cessation of prior chelation therapy.

data.name: Discontinuation of Zinc Therapy
data.label: Stop Zinc
data.description: Cessation of prior zinc therapy.

data.name: Study Intervention Compliance Monitoring
data.label: Compliance Monitoring
data.description: Monitoring participant adherence to study intervention administration, e.g., via SMS text messaging.

data.name: Retained Serum Sample Collection

code.decode: Collection of venous blood by venipuncture

data.label: Retained Serum Sample
data.description: Collection of a 15 mL serum sample for safety evaluation in case of unexpected findings.

data.name: Copper/Molybdenum-Controlled Diet Adherence
data.label: Controlled Diet
data.description: Adherence to a diet controlled for copper and molybdenum content.

data.name: Light Exercise Regimen Adherence
data.label: Exercise Regimen
data.description: Adherence to a light exercise regimen.

data.name: Bowel Movement Monitoring
data.label: BM Monitoring
data.description: Recording date, time, and weight of bowel movements.

data.name: Urination Monitoring
data.label: Urination Monitoring
data.description: Recording urine output.

data.name: Menstruation Checks
data.label: Menstruation Check
data.description: Monitoring menstruation for women of childbearing potential.

data.name: Concomitant Medication and Non-pharmacologic Therapy/Procedure Assessment
data.label: Concomitant Therapy Review
data.description: Review and documentation of concomitant medications and non-pharmacologic therapies/procedures.

data.name: Venous Access Placement

code.decode: Introduction of needle or intracatheter, vein

data.label: IV/Cannula Placement
data.description: Placement of a cannula or catheter for venous access.

data.name: Catheter Maintenance (Flushing)
data.label: Catheter Flush
data.description: Flushing of a venous catheter to maintain patency.

data.name: Liver Function Tests Monitoring
data.label: LFT Monitoring
data.description: Regular monitoring of liver function tests (e.g., ALT, AST).

data.name: Complete Blood Count Monitoring

code.decode: Complete (CBC) and automated differential WBC count

data.label: CBC Monitoring
data.description: Regular monitoring of complete blood count.

data.name: Neurologic Adverse Event Monitoring
data.label: Neuro AE Monitoring
data.description: Regular monitoring for neurologic adverse events.

data.name: Ophthalmological Examination

code.decode: Ophthalmological services: medical examination and evaluation with initiation of diagnostic and treatment program; intermediate, new patient

data.label: Eye Exam
data.description: Examination for Kayser Fleischer rings, a diagnostic criterion for Wilson disease.

data.name: Genetic Testing (ATP7B gene)

code.decode: Molecular pathology procedure, Level 5 (e.g., analysis of 2-5 exons by DNA sequence analysis, mutation scanning or other molecular pathology procedure)

data.label: ATP7B Genetic Test
data.description: Genetic testing for mutations in the ATP7B gene, a diagnostic criterion for Wilson disease.

data.name: Dose Modification of Study Intervention
data.label: Dose Modification
data.description: Adjustment of study intervention dosage (reduction, temporary interruption, or restriction of increase).

data.name: Study Intervention Discontinuation
data.label: Drug Discontinuation
data.description: Permanent cessation of study intervention administration.

data.name: Participant Withdrawal from Study
data.label: Study Withdrawal
data.description: Formal withdrawal of a participant from the study.

data.name: Early Discontinuation Visit
data.label: Early D/C Visit
data.description: Follow-up visit for participants who discontinue early from the study.

data.name: ECG Interpretation

code.decode: Electrocardiogram, routine ECG with at least 12 leads; interpretation and report only

data.label: ECG Review
data.description: Review and documentation of electrocardiogram findings.

data.name: Cannula
data.label: Cannula
data.description: Device for venous access to minimize needle sticks during blood draws.

data.name: Catheter
data.label: Catheter
data.description: Device for venous access, not to be left in place longer than 72 hours, requiring regular flushing.

data.name: SMS Text Messaging System
data.label: SMS System
data.description: System used by participants to confirm study intervention administration for compliance monitoring.

data.name: Inductively Coupled Plasma Mass Spectrometry (ICP-MS)
data.label: ICP-MS
data.description: Analytical instrument used to determine copper and molybdenum concentrations in biological and dietary samples.

data.name: Automated Blood Pressure Device
data.label: Automated BP Device
data.description: Device for automated measurement of blood pressure and heart rate.
